products.name: Men's Gray Long Sleeve Shirt with Black Logo
products.description: This long-sleeved shirt is made of the ultra-smooth cotton, and it has comfy long sleeves to protect you from the elements. The sleeves are cuffed at the hand for a tapered look that adds a little flair.

products.name: Black Baseball Hat with White Logo
products.description: Step up your accessory game with a new washed twill dad cap. Pair our embroidery logo design with a sporty feel and create a unique premium baseball hat that's bound to become a favorite.

products.name: Large Eco Tote Bag with Black Logo
products.description: Combine eco-friendliness and comfort with your personal style! Spacious organic twill tote bag made from sturdy fabric, with dual straps, and flat bottom. This tote can fit a whole lot of groceries, books, and other essentials.

products.name: Baby's Gray Bib with Black Logo
products.description: Avoid getting food stains on child’s clothes with this baby bib. The reinforced hook & loop closure makes it easy to put on, but hard for baby to take off. 4x4" embroidered logo.
